title: Digital Twin Explorer — Curated Insights
description:
Schema for manually curated insights that bind to chart/table views in the Digital Twin Explorer. Each insight locks the visualization to a specific endpoint and strata configuration, guiding the viewer to a relevant observation.

Workflow:
1. Upload digital twin predictions and preview in charts
2. Identify a scientifically relevant observation
3. Create an insight entry following this schema
4. The app renders the insight in the panel and binds it to the correct view

study_id.description: The study this insight set belongs to (e.g., 'UnlearnAI-2026-1')

created_by.description: Author or team who curated these insights

created_at.description: ISO date when insights were last updated

tag.description:
Category tag displayed on the insight card. Choose the one that best describes the nature of the observation:
- progression: Disease trajectory patterns over time
- heterogeneity: Within/between group variability
- endpoint: Sensitivity or behavior of a specific measure
- stratification: How staging/subgroups relate to outcomes
- safety: Safety-relevant signals
- enrichment: Implications for trial enrollment strategy

title.description: Short headline for the insight card. Should be a concrete claim, not a question. (e.g., 'Stage III shows accelerated composite decline')

summary.description: 1-3 sentence summary with key numbers. Visible when the insight is inactive (greyed out). Should give enough context that a clinical lead can decide whether to activate it.

detail.description: Extended analysis shown only when the insight is activated. Include clinical interpretation, references to literature, and implications for trial design. Markdown is not currently supported but plain text with line breaks is fine.

binding.description: Defines which chart/table configuration this insight locks to when activated

priority.description: Display priority (1 = highest, shown first). Insights with the same priority are shown in array order.

status.description: Workflow status. Only 'approved' insights are shown in the app. 'draft' and 'review' are for internal tracking.

endpoint.description: The endpoint key to select in the chart. This locks the chart's endpoint dropdown.

chart_strata.description: Which strata to activate in the chart's strata toggle. (e.g., ['Stage I', 'Stage III']). Must contain at least one value.

table_strata.description: Which strata to activate in the table's strata toggle. If omitted, defaults to the same as chart_strata.
